mapper.select: SELECT NVL(SUM(r.amount), 0) as "totalSales", NVL(SUM(r.amount * (r.commission_rate / 100)), 0) as "commissionAmount", NVL(SUM(cu.partner_discount_amount), 0) as "partnerCouponAmount", NVL(SUM(r.amount) - SUM(r.amount * (r.commission_rate / 100)) - NVL(SUM(cu.partner_discount_amount), 0), 0) as "netAmount" FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN order_detail od ON r.reservation_id = od.reservation_id LEFT JOIN coupon_usage cu ON od.order_id = cu.order_id AND cu.status = 'USED' WHERE r.partner_id = #{partnerId} AND r.status = 'SUCCESS' AND TO_CHAR(r.check_out_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{month}
